python -u -c 
import urllib.request, ssl

ctx = ssl.create_default_context()
ctx.check_hostname = False
ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE

req = urllib.request.Request(
    'https://www.ebi.ac.uk/europepmc/webservices/rest/PMC4959608/fullTextXML',
    headers={'User-Agent': 'research-tool mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk', 'Accept': 'application/xml'}
)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, context=ctx, timeout=30) as r:
    content = r.read()

outpath = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1038_nature18609/files/ding_2016_ds-network.xml'
with open(outpath, 'wb') as f:
    f.write(content)
print(f'Saved {len(content)} bytes to {outpath}')
